codebase_patterns.framework: Python CLI with click command groups and rich terminal output
codebase_patterns.data_flow: Parser returns SpecMetrics/ParsedSpec -> Scorer enriches with estimates -> Suggester generates recommendations
codebase_patterns.testing_pattern: pytest with tmp_path fixture for file-based tests, comprehensive edge case coverage
codebase_patterns.cli_structure: Click command group with subcommands (parse, score)
codebase_patterns.error_display: Rich console for formatted output with color tags like [red]Error:[/red]

common_mistakes_to_avoid: Spec says 'round up' but expected output shows truncation (int()) - always prioritize expected test output over ambiguous spec text
Don't duplicate version strings - import from __init__.py
Don't use broad 'except Exception' catches - prefer specific exceptions
Validate environment variable inputs before int() conversion
Remove unused imports (e.g., import math when using int() truncation)
effective_patterns: Priority-based parsing: each line counted in only one category (features > deps > integration)
Explicit UTF-8 encoding on all file operations
ParsedSpec wraps SpecMetrics + item lists for suggestion generation
New SpecMetrics instances returned (not mutated) for functional style
security_best_practices: File operations use pathlib.Path for safe path handling
No dynamic code execution (eval, exec, compile)
UTF-8 encoding explicitly specified prevents encoding attacks
Click validates file existence before processing

sessions.notes: All 3 features implemented in single session. Project complete.
